figures.caption: Figure 3: The Prompt Template for Constructing the Reasoning Process for SFT.

Figure 2: Case studies between DLR and baseline Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking. The premises and rationales in DLR are highlighted in yellow. These examples show that precise decomposed premises and visually grounded rationales lead to correct answers where the baseline fails.

Figure 1: Overview of the Decompose–Look–Reason (DLR) framework and its reinforcement finetuning training objectives. The bottom-right contour illustrates the joint optimization landscape induced by the VLM text policy pθ and the latent visual policy pϕ.
